title: Python Maze Game - Complete Project
subject: Computer Science
notes: Design, build and test a text-based maze game using Python. Requirements: 8+ linked rooms, 5+ items with interactions, scoring system, save/load functionality, documentation, and 2-3 minute video explanation.

title: Week 2 (Apr 11-18): Core Development - Maze Game
subject: Computer Science
notes: Week 2 deliverables: Implement room dictionary structure, build basic movement commands, add 5+ items to rooms, create item interaction functions (pick up, use, trade), implement inventory as a list, test room navigation and item interactions.
